title: Wire CI/CD that tests data, code, and the model
description: Extend CI/CD to validate data schemas and model behavior, not just unit tests, before a pipeline change ships.
body: Use when changes to training code or pipeline config can reach production retraining. Do not reuse a plain app CI that only runs unit tests — it misses data-contract breaks and model-quality regressions. Actions: in CI, validate input schemas, run a small training smoke, assert eval metrics against a floor, and check serving I/O contracts before merge. Validation signals include a CI log showing schema and metric-floor checks and a blocked merge on a seeded regression. Risk boundary: shipping a pipeline change that silently degrades models harms production; if metric-floor checks are missing, treat the pipeline as ungated and escalate.
